template: Third model family K>V replication (Phi-3.5-mini-instruct, MHA)
key_finding: K > V UNIVERSAL across 3 model families (Phi MHA + Qwen GQA + Llama GQA) x 3 positions = 9 conditions. Phi: early +98.3pp, mid +96.7pp, late +70.0pp. V-only early+mid = 297/298 combined. GQA confound ELIMINATED.
evidence_impact: Strong - extends K > V universality to 3rd family and MHA architecture. The most important architectural finding: routing > throughput is a property of attention itself, not head grouping.
next_planned: Priority: (1) Evidence consolidation (34 cycles). (2) K-only PGD on Phi (MHA). (3) Magnitude dose-response on Phi. (4) 4th model family (Gemma-2).

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space. Combined p=0.013 (K 6/56 vs V 0/57). Survives maximum-effort V-only disconfirmation.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED on spatial selectivity. Geometric/distributed confirmed by literature

positional_dissociation.status: STRONG and universal across 3 families. Explained by attention sinks at early positions

geometric_dissociation.status: K-V dissociation UNIVERSAL: 3 families x 3 positions = 9 conditions, including MHA. GQA confound eliminated.

natural_usage.status: H2O/TC protection via position. Sparse attention explains V immunity

cross_model_replication.status: COMPLETE: 3 families (Qwen GQA, Llama GQA, Phi MHA) x 3 positions. V-only early+mid = 297/298.

encoding_strategy.status: Digital/analog confirmed on Qwen/Llama. Phi untested for magnitude dose-response.

superadditive_interaction.status: Llama-specific (7.9-16.8x). Weak on Qwen. Untested on Phi.

literature_convergence.status: DECISIVE: 5+ independent groups. Gradient bottleneck. QK/OV framework grounds K>V. K-only PGD is novel experimental validation

null_space_kv_unification.status: STATISTICALLY SIGNIFICANT: K-only PGD 6/56 vs V-only 0/57 (p=0.013). V-only failure is NOT hyperparameter artifact.

disruption_vs_redirection.status: V=disruption (0 numeric redirects ever), K=redirection (2 genuine numeric redirects). Quality distinction holds.

mha_vs_gqa.status: NEW: K > V holds on MHA (Phi, 32 KV heads) identically to GQA (Qwen/Llama, 8 KV heads). GQA confound eliminated.
